entry.title: Data Transfer Error
entry.content:
4 Created Failed Money Overflow; cannot display all digits (ODBC -104) Money Overflow; cannot display all digits (ODBC -104)65171


How to fix?

entry.title: Re: Data Transfer Error
entry.content: Hi,

entry.title: Re: SAP IBP Excel 2402-2408: Access Denied
entry.content: Solution ended up being that Zscaler is the culprit. The authentication system was blocking the connection for the SAP IBP Add In, so it kept denying access. Had to talk to helpdesk to get them to unblock it but wanted to share solution in case others having to authenticate with Zscaler face the same issue.

entry.title: Re: RAP (Rest full application programming) IN SAP ABAP
entry.content:
I'm super confused why this appeared in the TechEd discussions but these days anything goes on SCN, I guess. One cannot be too shy about [ab]using tags when there is hardly anyone left to answer questions here. Sigh...

Not sure I completely understand the idea and question, but I'm guessing you want to sort of implement different updates while making it look like just the creation process from the outside. Depending on what you're actually wanting to do, this is likely feasible. There are 2 ways to implement your own save functionality in RAP: completely unmanaged scenario and "managed with unmanaged save" (one of the posts on the subject). I recommend exploring the latter first and use unmanaged only as a last resort. Sometimes a so-called "functional call" is actually a better option. This is usually the case when there is very little input (sometimes it's just a document number) but then extensive update operations are performed. In this case, it's really not about updating specific "entities". So definitely think first which scenario is the best fit, considering what data is passed around and what DB operations are performed (there are limitations on explicit COMMIT). With RAP, choosing the right scenario is 80% of success.

entry.title: Re: Remove and add zeroes in S4 HANA
entry.content:
data :s1 type string.
s1 = |{ '1234' ALPHA = IN WIDTH = 10 }|. "add 0
s1 = |{ '00001234' ALPHA = OUT }|. "1234.  "remove 0

entry.title: Re: Top Reasons to Attend SAP TechEd 2024
entry.content:
A piece of advice Please! do not miss the KEY100CEST | KEY100EDT SAP TechEd in 2024 Launch - Where Ideas Get Real

Size the exclusive opportunity to hear from the incredible Muhammad Alam, SAP Board Member from SAP Product Engineering! 🌟 This session will unveil game-changing advancements in SAP Build solutions, SAP Business AI, and SAP BTP. 

What’s in Store?

• Inspiration from the top minds at SAP

• Insights into the latest tech trends

• Innovation that you can bring back to your organization

See you there!! #SAPTechEd rocks

entry.title: How to settle AuC to statistical internal order
entry.content:
We have projects managed in SAP-PS, where each SAP-PS project collects construction costs and is settled to an Asset Under Construction (AUC). Once the project is completed and sold, we need to settle the AUC to an internal statistical order to calculate specific costs required by the financial team. Ultimately, these costs should be posted to a cost center.

To achieve this, we use the settlement rule ORD with the statistical internal order (IO) number. However, when settling through CJ88, the system directly settles the AUC to the cost center of the IO and does not post to the statistical IO at all. Is there a way to ensure that the system posts to the statistical IO?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: PO accrual engine re: Prematurely Finished POs.
entry.content: Did you ever figure out what was going on? We also discovered the same issue. Currently sitting at about 43K accrual sub-objects.

entry.title: Re: Automation Launcher in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hello Sirpa,

Please refer to the attached screenshot ("Automation Launcher.jpg"). Under the Process Automation service, you will find a separate plan for Automation-Attended along with Quota Management. You can follow Step 3 to filter for SAP Build Process Automation.

If you don't see the plan for Automation-Attended, Redirect to the global account, and 1. Click Entity Assignment 2. Search Build Process Automation 3. Select Automation -attended, Please refer to the screenshot attached (Service Plan)

If you need further assistance, feel free to reach out.

entry.title: Re: Creating an SAP Account (SAP Universal ID) and getting started in the community
entry.content:
Hi David

Thanks for this initiative, it is really amazing. I am Shafique. I am a finance professional, interested to switch to tech side and I was confused where to start from. This initiative clears the air to decide a starting point.

Would highly appreciate if you please send the key (link) to new opportunities.

Thanks and regards

Shafique

entry.title: Re: Dump"DYNPRO_FIELD_CONVERSION" while during reversal of GI
entry.content: the screen has a screen field with take properties from dict, hence the sign value is not displayed, since the value is negative you get the error. analyze how was possible to get a negative value. Check table RESB the quantity withdrawal field are absolute values

entry.title: Re: Request to host a CodeJam in Bangalore
entry.content: @thomas_jung - thanks for letting me know. I didn't know the rules of engagement. I thought it's a community post asking for Code Jam and I replied. But if the offer I made is in breach of compliance, I withdraw it. The intent was good :). Thomas, if you can help me connect with point of contact from SAP in whose collaboration we could run this AEM code jam - I will be very glad to assist. By the way - I work for Solace which is the product underpinning SAP Advanced Event Mesh and I take care of product adoption and EDA evangelism across APJ and Middle East MU. Looking forward to hear from you.

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports 2020 Ole Object retain design size an...
entry.content: Thank you for the suggestion. I'll look into this further.

entry.title: Re: ABAP BW RSA1 program name of routine
entry.content: Use the TCode, SE93. RSAWBN_START

entry.title: Can Billing Plan be activated for a Service Material in a Sales Contract?
entry.content:
I am working with Scope Item I9I and I see the option to have Billing plan for a Finished good but not for a Service Item. Can that be configured on CBC or why is that not an option?

I see that in scope item Sales Order Processing with Customer Down Payment BKJ the service material can actually have a billing plan, so I am not sure of the reason of not being able to activate it on a Sales Contract.

Thanks,

MR

entry.title: Number formatting changes when executing SAC Stories in View Mode or via Hyperlink
entry.content:
Problem:

The Number formatting changes when the story is executed in view mode or story is executed via Hyperlink or story is executed from the link shared.

Workaround :

The story works fine when we access directly from the Public folder. We are using Live connection and Backend is SAP HANA. 

Impact :

We have created a Dashboard with all the story Hyperlinks and Business will access the respective Dashboards from the Hyperlink provided. From the Business point of view nothing is working as expected.

Observation :  

The issue started with latest SAC patch upgrade on Aug 17-18th 2024.

Currently we are with this version :

Versions

2024.15.8 (Client)

2024.15.6 (Server)

Build Dates

Wed Aug 28 2024 16:36:34+0000 (Client)

Wed Aug 21 2024 17:52:03+0200 (Server)

Few more Observations from tests conducted :

  1. Number formatting changes for a newly created story as well when used measure based input control.
  2. Number formatting changes even when there is no % calculations involved.
  3. Number formatting changes only with the Cross calculations.
  4. Above issues exists in Optimized design for both Responsive page and Classic page as well.
  5. Only few story have this issue after the SAC Patch upgrade.

SAP Analytics Cloud SAP Analytics Cloud for planning #SACCROSSCALCULATIONS #SACPATCH

entry.title: sap sac bi license
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

I realize that Planning Professional allows you to develop planning application and Planning Standard license allows users to use the planning apps to enter and interact with planning data.  My question is would a user with BI license who will not be doing any planning but only view planning data in stories using planning model?  I want to limit Planning Standard licenses.

Thanks

Abdul

entry.title: Widget color is not displayed when SAC story is executed in view mode or via Hyperlink
entry.content:
Problem:

The Widget color is not displayed when the story is executed in view mode or story is executed via Hyperlink or story is executed from the link shared.

Workaround :

The story works fine when we access directly from the Public folder. We are using Live connection and Backend is SAP HANA. 

Impact :

We have created a Dashboard with all the story Hyperlinks and Business will access the respective Dashboards from the Hyperlink provided. From the Business point of view nothing is working as expected.

Observation :  

The issue started with latest SAC patch upgrade on Aug 17-18th 2024.

Currently we are with this version :

Versions

2024.15.8 (Client)

2024.15.6 (Server)

Build Dates

Wed Aug 28 2024 16:36:34+0000 (Client)

Wed Aug 21 2024 17:52:03+0200 (Server)

Few more Observations  :

  1. Widget color is not displayed for the newly created story as well, we used widget color  to highlight measure based input control.
  2. Above issues exists in Optimized design for both Responsive page and Classic page as well.
  3. Only few story have this issue after the SAC Patch upgrade.

SAP Analytics Cloud SAP Analytics Cloud for planning SAP Analytics Cloud, data modeling #SAP_WIDGET #SAC_PATCH

entry.title: Missing BEx Analyzer Icons on Excel´s Add-Ins Menu
entry.content:
Hi dear SAP Community. Can anyone advise me on how to get back the BEx Analyzer Icons on the Add-Ins Menu in Excel?

I currently only have the Bex Analyzer Menu in the Menu Commands area, but the icons that showed on the right of this menu have disappeared.

Thanks!

entry.title: Unlocking SAP BTP: Your Guide to SAP Business Technology Platform Use Case One-Pagers
entry.content:
SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP) offers a unified environment that allows businesses to bring together application development, automation, data and analytics, integration, and AI capabilities, all optimized for SAP applications. However, with such a suite of tools, knowing where to start with SAP BTP can be the most challenging part for businesses. To support organizations in their digital transformation journey and help customers unlock the full potential of SAP BTP, we created SAP BTP Use Case One-Pagers.  

 

Understanding SAP BTP Use Case One-Pagers

The SAP BTP Use Case One-Pagers serves as an effective compass for businesses. It explains the business values, features, and implementation strategies of various components within the SAP BTP ecosystem. The main goal of these one-pagers is to simplify the complexities of digital solutions and streamline your journey toward full adoption and utilization of the SAP BTP portfolio.

The SAP BTP Use Case One-Pagers also highlights the proven and validated use cases that customers should look to first. Examples of measurable business value with targeted solutions to business challenges show the potential outcomes of SAP BTP utilization.

 

How to utilize SAP BTP Use Case One-Pagers:

With the SAP BTP Use Case One-Pagers at your disposal, your first step is to identify the business challenge or growth area you want to address. This could range from enhancing customer experiences to improving decision-making capabilities with real-time data. You could also drill down to your line of business/department area to see what use cases are available. Consider a business that is currently utilizing SAP S/4HANA for Finance.

  1. In this scenario, you can start with the SAP S/4HANA Finance section of the One-Pager, and read through the business challenges each use case targets. 
  2. Let’s say you know that your company is having a tough time with manual processes that take time, and some manual document processes are especially prone to errors. The 'Automate processes to empower finance professionals' use case provides a clear insight into the capabilities of SAP BTP connecting SAP S/4HANA to various applications and processes.

    • SAP Integration Suite can seamlessly integrate finance with sales and HR, while SAP Build Process Automation fosters an automated, cohesive workflow to create a streamlined and unified workflow that enhances efficiency and productivity.

  3. You now understand the expected outcomes and the value the use case will bring to your business, with a step-by-step implementation guide from the corresponding Discovery Center Missions. The Mission shows the reference architecture, practical guidance for implementing the use case, and business accelerators to help ensure a smooth implementation.

  4. You can also read further about other existing customers that are deriving business value with SAP BTP, or take the Learning course. 

 

Begin leveraging these resources today to unlock the full potential of the SAP Business Technology Platform, foster business innovation, and accelerate growth. So why wait? Immerse yourself in these invaluable guides now and embark on a transformative journey with SAP BTP Use Case One-Pagers today!

entry.title: Re: How to Connect S4HANA Public Cloud With SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi @Charls ,

In the SAP S/4HANA Cloud system, communication arrangements have been created for the following communication scenarios:

  • SAP_COM_0532

    For more information, see Integrating CDS Views Using SAP Datasphere in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud documentation.

  • SAP_COM_0531

    For more information, see Integrating CDI in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud documentation.

  • SAP_COM_0722

    For more information, see Integrating SAP Data Warehouse Cloud in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud documentation.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATASPHERE/9f804b8efa8043539289f42f372c4862/abb159e027184c98a54fc1b2a88dd3f5.html?locale=en-US

Secondly, It is possible to use Data Flow and Remote Table at the same time and you have to select 

Data Provisioning Option "Data Provisioning Agent" and your DP agent while creating connection in Datasphere. Depending on the features of remote tables, you have to assign the above scenarios 

Hope it answers your question!

Regards,

Armaan

entry.title: Re: RFC SLD_UC/SLD_NUC
entry.content:
Dear Customer， 

Please check in the reg_info file of SMD if SLD_UC and SLD_NUC are maintained correctly. Following two KBAs are helpful to resolve the error

2866111 - SLD_UC gateway connection returns 748 after solman 7.2 upgrade
2075799 - ERROR: Error (Msg EGW 748 not found) [VIDEO]

Best regards,
Vera Jiang

entry.title: Re: Unable to get SCROM progress
entry.content:
Hi Kenny,

You only have one SCO in your eLearning course, that's the overall Book object.  Book objects, each of the Simulation modes, and Quizzes count as SCOs.  In your instance, you only have one SCO so the system will assign 100% of the course completion value to the Book object.  This means you must access the underlying Book Pages to get that value.  Ultimately, I think the system is doing what you asked, if you complete the Book Pages beneath the Book, the system is registering your course complete.

The only question I would have is why you have set the Send Success Status value to Never?  If you only want to track course completion, I guess this is fine.  However, if you want to determine if users have successfully completed Quizzes embedded in other eLearnings, I suspect that this will be an issue.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: Transport Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 3-System Landscape: From Basics to Comp
entry.content:
Hi @ThomasSchneider 

Is there a way to create a new custom transport attribute (similar to thru old SE03) on S/4HANA Cloud?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: How to access Message processing logs in cpi using gr...
entry.content:
One way to handle this would be to add the standard message logging groovy script in your exception sub-process. This way, the groovy script is executed when there is any failure and stores the message.

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message;
import java.util.HashMap;
def Message processData(Message message) {
    def body = message.getBody(java.lang.String) as String;
    def messageLog = messageLogFactory.getMessageLog(message);
    if(messageLog != null){
        messageLog.setStringProperty("Logging#1", "Printing Payload As Attachment")
        messageLog.addAttachmentAsString("ResponsePayload:", body, "text/plain");
     }
    return message;
}

entry.title: How to acquire S/4HANA licenses for CAL installation
entry.content:
SAP Cloud Appliance Library 

Hi,
we would like to setup a couple of instances with CAL for customer training purposes.
The process to acquire the CAL licenses is quite clear but we cannot find much information on who to contact to get the underneath product licences (S/4HANA per example). It is said "to contact your sales representative". As a new customer we do not have one yet.

What is the process to get in touch with one ?

Thanks !

entry.title: Batch Quantity is not updated as per Potency in Process Order
entry.content:

I am trying to perform MQC in process order but when I am executing the calculation the calculated quantity is not being updated:

After batch determination, the value that I want to be updated after calculation is 3,030.

Is there something wrong in my formula?

I'm thinking about implementing note 674581, does anyone know if it would solve the problem?

Thank you in advance,

Carol.

entry.title: SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud EPIC Integration
entry.content:
针对在 SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud 上实施 EPIC 有如下问题想进行确认：

1.当前我们想先实施两家银行 中国银行和汇丰银行，这两个银行是否都需要前置机？如果只是把文件传输到银行的Portal 端，而不是直接付款 是否也同样需要前置机？

2. 在SAP S/4 HANA OP 版本上，系统有内置6家 中国银行的报文格式，在SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud  上是否同样有内嵌这6家中国银行的报文格式？还是说我们需要一个中间平台把SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud  中标准的报文格式转换成相应银行的报文格式？

3. 我们在SAP 发布的SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud   EPIC 中有看到如下一张图：


图中的“合作伙伴”指的是什么？他的具体功能除了报文转换外还有什么功能？此“合作伙伴” 是否是必须的？

entry.title: Re: order BOM explode in a sales order line
entry.content: order bom creation is after sales order line creation. because order Bom has a prerequite condition, that is you must specify the order line no. so for the first time, sales order line creation, it can NOT explode order-bom. So, if order-bom can be used in BOM explosion, there shoulde a method to reload the order-bom into the order.

I hope that you will consider my request.

Thank you!

entry.title: Multiple Address Handling in Service Transactions (Using Bill-to Party)
entry.content:
Introduction

SAP S/4HANA Cloud supports multiple address handling in SD documents and service transactions. You can find sufficient documentation about this feature in SAP Help Portal and prepare your system for this feature. Preparation and configuration guides are provided in the attachment to the SAP Note 3119364.

If you’re a user of service transactions (such as service contracts, service orders, etc.), you can follow this blog in which we're going to extract the content from those BIG guides and summarize the most essential parts for service transactions only. This is a short guide for Service users.

In this blog, we're going to use the bill-to party and the service order in our example.

Step 1: Activate multiple address handling for customer master data in SAP Business Partner

Find the configuration activity Activate Multiple Address Handling for Customer Master Data in SAP BP. Switch to On to enable the function.

Fig.1 Activate for customer master data

Step 2: Prepare your business partner master data

You can use apps and integration integration technologies in SAP S/4HANA Cloud to prepare your BP master data. See more information in the Master Data Guide attached to the SAP Note 3119364.

Step 3: Activate multiple address handling in SD documents using SAP Business Partner

Find the configuration activity Activate Multiple Address Handling in SD Documents using SAP BP. Switch to On to enable the function.

Fig. 2 Activate for SD

Step 4: Set up partner determination for sales document header

Find the configuration activity Set Up Partner Determination for Sales Document Header. Go to the partner determination procedure SO02 Sales Order. In its partner functions, find the function Bill-to Party that you want to set up. Choose BBP004 in the Address Determination for Partner Function column.

Note that if you can’t see the Address Determination for Partner Function column, it’s most probably that the switch state in the Activate Multiple Address Handling in SD Documents using SAP BP configuration (step 3 above) is not ON.

Fig.3 Set up partner determination in SD

Fig.4 Partner Function in Procedure

In the Partner Functions section, the partner function type KU and the address determination transaction BBP004 for the partner function Bill-to Party are maintained. 

Fig.5 Set up partner function

The following steps can be found in the configuration guide attached to the SAP Note 3119364. From there, you can also find the guidance for other types of business partners such as sold-to party and ship-to party.

Step 5: Set up partner determination for Service

Find the configuration activity Define Partner Determination Procedure in Service. Create your own partner determination procedure (e.g. ZSVO1001) and configure its partner functions (Partner Functions in Procedure tab):

  1. Choose the bill-to party partner function for Service (CRM)
  2. Map the CRM bill-to party to the address determination transaction BBP004
  3. Set the attribute Changeable Address
Fig.6 Partner Determination Procedure in Service

 Fig.7 Partner Function in Service

Step 6: Assign partner determination procedure to service order

Find the configuration activity Assign Partner Determination Procedure to Transaction Types. Choose the transaction type SVO1 for standard service orders. Assign your customed partner determination procedure (e.g. ZSVO1001) to it.

Fig.8 Assign Partner Determ. Procedure to Service Transaction

Fig.9 Assignment Details

The steps above can be found in the configuration guide attached to the SAP Note 3119364. From there, you can also find the guidance for other types of business partners such as sold-to party and ship-to party.

Step 7: Add additional billing address to your business partner

Find the app to maintain your business partner master data. For example, the Maintain Business Partner app. Add a new address for your business partner and make it the billing address. In our case, we use the business partner 17100003.

Fig.10 Add a new address

 

Fig.11 Maintain billing address

Step 8: Test the address in service order and its follow-ups

Go to the Manage Service Orders app. Create a new service order. Go to the Parties Involved tab. You can find the additional address is displayed.

Fig.12 Bill-to address in service order

Release the service order and create the service confirmation for billing. A billing document request is created for that service confirmation. 

Fig.13 Service confirmation created to service order

You can find the billing address that you maintained visible in the BDR of the service confirmation. That information will be subsequently forwarded to a follow-up billing document such as an invoice.

Fig.14 Bill-to address in BDR

Conclusion

In this blog, we summarized the major steps to use the multiple address handling in Service area of SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition. We used the bill-to party and service order as the example to demonstrate you the steps. We also verified the settings in the service order processing. We hope this little guide can help you with the entire procedure. 

Additional Reading

SAP Help Portal: Multiple Address Handling in SD Documents Using SAP Business Partner

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello David,

I'm writing to express high interest in participating in the digital skills initiative.

I have a background in design be it graphic design, animation, editing and a UX design. I really want to hone my skills so that they are founded on Human Centered Design leading into UX design. I feel giving users experiences that are smooth, seamless, and engaging is of the utmost importance and SAP looks to tackle these issues. 

I feel I am a good fit for this program as I have a background in teaching and mixing that with my design background allows me to break down complex topics for others understand.

I'm really looking forward to starting this journey!

entry.title: Re: Editable column affects the values in other columns V...
entry.content:
Hi @Konstantina 

I don't remember seeing this exact behavior in recent years but I've seen one where whenever there is a calculated column and an editable column in a form the calculation only gets triggered when the editable column gets edited (and I believe there is a fix in the way the calculation is written for that).

I would suggest creating a ticket. 

I would be interested in knowing the final outcome after engineering investigation.

Thanks 

Xavier

entry.title: Re: Field cannot be updated (ODBC -1029) when adding Incoming Payment against Service Invoice
entry.content: Hi, If you working with India Localization, then it is an issue which needs to be investigated. There is currently no SAP Note recording it. So, would recommend that you open a support incident (if Partner) or contact partner and he/she opens the incident for you and the Support investigates the issue. You can refer to this thread as well. Kr, Jitin

entry.title: Re: Field cannot be updated (ODBC -1029) when adding Inco...
entry.content: This is happening for Service Invoice only. And already raised incident twice with SAP but after 2-3 months this query start happening again.

entry.title: Re: RAP Unmanaged Scenario Example Which Should Include CRUD Operations, and Actions
entry.content:
Hi,

Thanks for sharing. However, Since Define View systax is obsolete as of AS ABAP 7.57, It's better to use Define View Entity / Define Root View Entity. Which S/4 HANA version are you using?

entry.title: Delivery Document
entry.content: My requirement is to retrieve all the delivery document numbers under the sales order number shown in the attached image. Which API should I use to achieve this?

entry.title: Re: Field cannot be updated (ODBC -1029) when adding Inco...
entry.content: Thank you for reply but this note is not related to my query.

entry.title: Re: Tracking transformations by leveraging Architecture Decisions
entry.content: Thanks for posting this article. The link to the decision capture template is a simple way to get started. I am sure you could also capture your decisions in a LeanIX factsheet if you owned that tool as well. What are your thoughts there?

entry.title: Re: New Integration of SAP Cloud Transport Management and SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Dear @Johannes23,

The commercial models of SAP Cloud Transport Management are used to keep it simple and transparent. Means you can choose between CPEA, Pay-As-You-Go, SAP BTPEA and Trial.

Billing block size is 1 GB bandwidth -  GB of bandwidth is defined as an amount of data traffic transmitted and received by the Cloud Service. 

You can find further information in the Discovery Center - https://discovery-center.cloud.sap/serviceCatalog/cloud-transport-management/?region=all&tab=service_plan&commercialModel=cpea.

Hope this helps.

Best regards,

Moritz

entry.title: Speaker Registration Now Open for SAP Inside Track Bengaluru 5th October 2024 – Business AI Edition
entry.content:
We are excited to invite passionate speakers to join us at SAP Inside Track Bengaluru 2024, taking place on October 5th, 2024! This year, the focus is on the transformative power of SAP Business AI, and we are looking for experts to share their insights across various tracks. If you have experience in building AI applications, creating innovative Business AI solutions, or working with Embedded AI in SAP products, we encourage you to contribute to this event.

Event Details:

Date: October 5th, 2024
Time: 8 AM - 5 PM IST
Venue: SAP Labs India, 138, SAP Labs Rd, EPIP Zone, Whitefield, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560066

Learn more about the event in our announcement blog post.

Speaker Tracks for Your Proposal:

  1. Track 2: Building AI Applications on SAP BTP
    Delve into the technicalities of building AI-powered applications on SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP). Share how developers and architects can leverage SAP BTP to create impactful AI solutions that drive business value.
  2. Track 3: Business AI Solutions from the Ecosystem (Partners & Customers)
    Highlight successful AI solutions developed by SAP partners and customers. Present case studies, implementation experiences, and collaborative projects that demonstrate the innovative use of Business AI within the SAP ecosystem.
  3. Track 4: Embedded AI Across Solutions (SAP S/4HANA, SuccessFactors, and Other SAP Products)
    Explore how Embedded AI is integrated into various SAP products like SAP S/4HANA, SuccessFactors, and CX. Discuss how these intelligent features are transforming business processes and enhancing user experiences.

Why Speak at SAP Inside Track Bengaluru 2024 – Business AI Edition?

  • Showcase Your Expertise: Share your knowledge with an engaged audience of SAP professionals.
  • Network with Peers: Connect with fellow experts, partners, and SAP enthusiasts.
  • Gain Recognition: Boost your professional profile and gain visibility within the SAP community.

How to Register:

Ready to share your insights at SAP Inside Track Bengaluru 2024 – Business AI Edition?
Register here to become a speaker and contribute to one of the most anticipated SAP community events of the year.

Next Steps:

  1. Proposal Review: Our expert team will review your submission. If shortlisted, we will reach out for more details.
  2. Internal Review: After a thorough review, we will notify you about the next steps, including presentation formats and promotional details.

We look forward to your valuable contributions and hope to see you at SAP Inside Track Bengaluru 2024!

Best regards,
Ranjeet

entry.title: Re: TU Check In Warehouse Process Type
entry.content: Thanks a lot.. I was having same issue. After assining WPT P999, I was able to check in TU successfuly

entry.title: Re: New Integration of SAP Cloud Transport Management and SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hi @tripti197,

The deployments do not happen on feature status change at the moment. But there is a "Deploy" button on top of the transports section in features to trigger deployments. So there is no need to navigate to the CTMS tenant for import actions.

Best regards,

Moritz

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano ,

I am excited to express my interest in participating in the SAP Digital Skills Initiative. Having spent over 15 years working in data analytics, data science, and cloud computing, alongside my major academic background in health and life sciences, I am now transitioning from academia to focus on the digital transformation of businesses, particularly in the healthcare industry.

I have long admired SAP as a leader in this field, and I am eager to expand my expertise, specifically in the SAP S/4HANA system, to drive impactful digital innovations in healthcare. This initiative represents an excellent opportunity for me to gain the skills necessary to support this goal.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to contributing and learning through this program.

Best regards,

Hamid-Reza Kohan-Ghadr

entry.title: Re: Widget color is not displayed when SAC story is executed in view mode or via Hyperlink
entry.content: It might be related to lite viewer, would recommend to create a ticket to SAP

entry.title: Re: Field cannot be updated (ODBC -1029) when adding Inco...
entry.content: Hi, Plan for an upgrade to latest FP released and if you or user has the scenario with which the issue can be reproduced, then update the same on the incident itself.

entry.title: Re: Number formatting changes when executing SAC Stories in View Mode or via Hyperlink
entry.content: Would recommend to create a ticket to SAP on it.

entry.title: Re: sap sac bi license
entry.content:
Hi Abdul,

Yes a user with BI license can still consume data from a planning model. Please see the following:
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/20d92cebb9f94699949f99bd54a169bd.html?locale=en-US&q=licenses

BI standard license users can also actually perform planning on private versions, but they can't then publish to a public version. They also can't plan against unbooked values.

Cheers, Ivan.

entry.title: Re: Custom login screen for Cloud Foundry deployed apps with authorization enabled
entry.content: hi nishakn, i have same problem.Any solution for this?

entry.title: Hana Cloud Dashboard "Uh oh. Something went amiss."
entry.content:

Any one facing same ? any idea what could be wrong.

entry.title: Re: Setup of the SAP Signavio Process Insights connector within SAP Signavio Process Intelligence

Hello,

Try to update the Bex add-on support pack and office service pack,

Regards

SS

entry.title: Re: Request to host a CodeJam in Bangalore

Hi @Vidyadhar_Kothekar ,

I’m for Thomas team and we conduct SAP CodeJam. I have emailed you with the topic details.

Regards,

Shilpa

entry.title: Re: how to manage sap landscapes by two solution manager...
entry.content:
Hi Arturo,

please use option 2: Set-up the necessary clients in your SolMan Dev system (for example client 200 -> 300 -> 400) and manage this "landscape" by your SMQ system.

Works fine. 

 

Fingers crossed and kind regards,

Martin

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
I am an SAP Business One Trainee Consultant from Quetta, Pakistan. As a CA student and a commerce graduate, I am keen to expand my skills and knowledge in the SAP ecosystem. I am particularly interested in learning SAP Analytics Cloud and believe that the digital skills initiative by SAP Learning is a fantastic opportunity for individuals like myself. I am eager to take on the challenge and undergo the necessary training to achieve SAP Certification.

Thank you for considering my interest in this initiative.

entry.title: Re: Having trouble editing an Onboarding Email Template
entry.content: how can we add other recipients to the email template? I mean other then the ones that you can select from the dropdown

entry.title: Re: Onboarding email services recipient
entry.content:
Hi guys, 

do you have any solutions? We have the same issue.

entry.title: Re: ABAP runtime error - EC01
entry.content: Screenshot of short dump is useless, it's the whole file as text which is important. Title would be better with DDIC_TYPELENG_INCONSISTENT instead of runtime error. Search the Web using SE11 Utilities -> Database Object -> Check, and SE14 DDIC Reconstruct, e.g. https://me.sap.com/notes/1248769/E, https://me.sap.com/notes/211492.

entry.title: S/4HANA Public Cloud Manage Outbound Deliveries – VL06O does not show result based on Freight Order
entry.content:
In S/4HANA public cloud Manage Outbound Deliveries – VL06O, user is trying to post the Goods issues for the deliveries which are associated with Freight Order. The App is not giving any results when searching for outbound deliveries based on the freight order.

For IM managed deliveries, how we can identify the list of deliveries planned in freight order and trigger the goods issue.

entry.title: Re: How to Connect S4HANA Public Cloud With SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi @armaansingla1992，

Perfect and detailed answer. Thank you so much for your blog and answers!

Best Regards,
Charls

entry.title: Re: Top Reasons to Attend SAP TechEd 2024
entry.content:
I had a quick look at the session catalog for TechEd Virtual and most of the covered topics will fly right over my head because I don't have any experience with anything they relate to. The reason for that is that we are still on Netweaver 7.50 systems and will stay in an "on premise" system even when we make the move to S/4HANA over the next few years.

Having said that, I still plan to tune in throughout the 2 days but with perhaps another focus, namely to just build up some more "passive knowledge" to what all is out there but no expectations to actually put any of that to actual use myself. So, here is my bullet point list of reasons to join SAP TechEd virtual:

  • Just tuning in to "hear what's up" to at least have heard about new stuff
  • Looking for some sessions which are applicable for our journey towards S/4HANA
  • Getting a chance for some virtual networking and building connections
  • Perhaps - finally - continue working on this blog post from way back in 2021 (as of right now, my head is still spinning): Trying to stop the spinning of terms in my head - work in progress

Here are the sessions I've thus far added to my dashboard:

  • KEY100CEST | SAP TechEd in 2024 Launch - Where ideas get real
  • DEV101A | Keynote recap + Community welcome
  • DEV100A | Developer keynote [deconstructed]: Keeping the promise
  • DEV102CEST | SAP Community Welcome
  • DEV100C | Developer keynote [deconstructed]: Keeping the promise

Cheers

Bärbel

entry.title: Hi, can someone direct me to documentation on how to do clustering on 2 Business Objects 4.2?
entry.content:
Hi, can someone direct me to documentation on how to do clustering on 2 Business Objects 4.2?
We are going to upgrade our system to SAP BO 4.2 (parallel setup for parallel testing). What's the procedure to configure 2 servers for clustering?

entry.title: Re: Hi, can someone direct me to documentation on how to do clustering on 2 Business Objects 4.2?
entry.content: We are using Windows server

entry.title: Re: Where to find the business functions related to S4han...
entry.content:
Hi Kehkashan 

There is no need to activate BFs in SAP PS in S/4 HANA. You can activate BFs as per the business needs. 

Please refer to the attached link on activating BFs when Best Practices are activated. Most of these are in other areas..

SAP Help 

Best Regards

Sammar

entry.title: Re: How to get automatic email notification if any batch job fails?
entry.content: The above link is broken, please share the steps to do this.

entry.title: Re: EBBR - Fixed Price Cost Based POC: Plan Cost is doubl...
entry.content:
Hi Thijs,

Unfortunately I have to agree with Owen that best would be to have system access. The plan category REVREC01 is more a technical plan category for the purpose of revenue recognition. It is updated when you run the revaluation in EBRR and allows fetching data in a faster way in the monitor app for display reasons. Therefore the fact that it is showing the double revenue is not the route cause.

I have seen the issue before in S/4HANA On Premise, and there it was addressed as a fix with note: 3441208 - Wrong plan cost/revenue from acdocp for event based revenue recognition.

However, I understand that you work in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, and there this should not exist as root cause.

Could you please open an incident.

Thank you and best regards, Volkmar Zahn S/4HANA Product Management

entry.title: Re: Transfer of Balance from a Supplier Reconciliation Ac...
entry.content:
Hello Lucy,

Thank you for your response. We've attempted to issue the credit memo with the relevant supplier and have included the GL account 21310004 in the same document to offset the balance.

Best regards,

Rishav.

entry.title: How to check the GR volume and data per PO
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

I was wondering if there's T-code to find the GR data such as items, # of units rcvd etc,,, data per PO.

I am able to track using MB51 but I wasn't able to find the window in MB51 to search by PO# where I could 

see the PO# in result when searched with other factors such as item, movement type etc...

I would like to know if there's report or T-code enables me to search the same result using PO# only say I do not know other datas like posted dates, items...

Thanks a lot in advance

entry.title: Re: Why get_selected_rows of cl_gui_alv_grid isn't working with only one selected record?
entry.content:
I'm trying to call it at mine USER_COMMAND event, after clicking an added toolbar button

 METHOD USER_COMMAND.
    if e_ucomm = '&EXCH'.
      lo_alv->get_selected_rows( IMPORTING ET_INDEX_ROWS = lt_selected_rows ).
      PERFORM check_connection.
      PERFORM initialize_vbeln_table_to_send.
      PERFORM initialize_vbrk_table_to_send.
      MODIFY zva_vbeln_status from table lt_selected_vbelns.
      clear lt_selected_vbelns.
      FREE OBJECT InvVatXml.
      clear: so_vbeln[], so_vbeln.
    endif.
....
ENDMETHOD.

 

 METHOD handle_toolbar.
    DATA: ls_toolbar TYPE stb_button.

    case sel_node_key.
      WHEN text-001.
        CLEAR ls_toolbar.

        MOVE '&EXCH' TO ls_toolbar-function.                "#EC NOTEXT
        MOVE 0 TO ls_toolbar-butn_type.
        MOVE ICON_INTENSIFY TO ls_toolbar-icon.
        MOVE 'Подписать и Отправить'(202) TO ls_toolbar-quickinfo.
        MOVE 'Подписать и Отправить' TO ls_toolbar-text.
        MOVE ' ' TO ls_toolbar-disabled.                    "#EC NOTEXT
        APPEND ls_toolbar TO e_object->mt_toolbar.
....
ENDMETHOD.

 

Also i have an grid with tree at left side and alv at right, which displays after node item clicked.


 METHOD init_container.
    CLEAR SCREEN.
    FREE lo_alv.
    FREE obj_tree.
    clear lt_events.
    clear gt_fieldcat.
    FREE left_container.
    FREE right_container.
    if split_cont is NOT INITIAL.
      split_cont->free( ).
      FREE split_cont.
    endif.
    CREATE OBJECT split_cont
      EXPORTING
        parent                  = cl_gui_container=>screen0
        no_autodef_progid_dynnr = 'X'
        rows                    = 1
        columns                 = 2.

*    split_cont->set_width( width = 2180 ).
    split_cont->SET_COLUMN_WIDTH( id = 1 WIDTH = 13 ).

    left_container = split_cont->get_container( row = 1 column = 1 ).
    right_container = split_cont->get_container( row = 1 column = 2 ).

    if obj_tree is INITIAL.
      CREATE OBJECT obj_tree
        EXPORTING
          parent              = left_container
          node_selection_mode = cl_gui_column_tree=>node_sel_mode_single
          NO_HTML_HEADER      = 'X'
          NO_TOOLBAR          = 'X'.

    endif.
    call method obj_tree->get_registered_events
      IMPORTING
        events = lt_events.


    l_event-eventid = cl_gui_column_tree=>eventid_node_double_click.
    append l_event to lt_events.
    l_event-eventid = cl_gui_column_tree=>eventid_item_double_CLICK.
    append l_event to lt_events.


    CALL METHOD obj_tree->set_registered_events
      EXPORTING
        events                    = lt_events
      EXCEPTIONS
        cntl_error                = 1
        cntl_system_error         = 2
        illegal_event_combination = 3.
    IF sy-subrc <> 0.
      MESSAGE x208(00) WITH 'ERROR'.                        "#EC NOTEXT
    ENDIF.

    ls_fieldcat-fieldname = 'NAME'.
    ls_fieldcat-coltext = 'Кол-во'.
    ls_fieldcat-outputlen = 17.
    ls_fieldcat-seltext = 'Кол-во'.
    ls_fieldcat-datatype = 'INT'.
    ls_fieldcat-intlen = 5.
    ls_fieldcat-decimals = 0.
    APPEND ls_fieldcat TO gt_fieldcat.

    l_hierarchy_header-heading = 'Раздел'(100).
    l_hierarchy_header-width = 35.
    l_hierarchy_header-width_pix = ' '.

    call method obj_tree->set_table_for_first_display
      EXPORTING
        is_hierarchy_header = l_hierarchy_header
      CHANGING
        it_outtab           = lt_of_tree
        IT_FIELDCATALOG     = gt_fieldcat.

    data : gs_fieldcat like LINE OF lt_of_tree.
    ls_layo-EXP_IMAGE ='@FQ@'.
    ls_layo-n_IMAGE = '@FQ@'.
    gs_fieldcat-name =  lines( tab_of_vblen_status ).
    CALL METHOD obj_tree->add_node
      EXPORTING
        i_relat_node_key = p_relat_key
        i_relationship   = cl_gui_column_tree=>relat_last_child
        i_node_text      = 'Загрузка на портал'
        is_node_layout   = ls_layo
        is_outtab_line   = gs_fieldcat
      IMPORTING
        e_new_node_key   = p_node_key.
....

 DATA : mo_controller type ref to lcl_controller.
    CREATE OBJECT mo_controller.
    set HANDLER mo_controller->ITEM_DOUBLE_CLICK FOR obj_tree.

    if sel_node_key is NOT INITIAL.
      ls_layout-sel_mode = 'A'.
      init=>init_fieldcat( ).
      init=>create_alv_and_display( ).
      CALL METHOD obj_tree->EXPAND_NODE( i_node_key = l_carrid_key ).
    endif.
    call method obj_tree->frontend_update.
*MODIFY SCREEN.
    CALL METHOD cl_gui_cfw=>flush
      EXCEPTIONS
        cntl_system_error = 1
        cntl_error        = 2.
    MODIFY SCREEN.
ENDMETHOD.

METHOD create_alv_and_display.
    DATA : alv_controller type ref to CONTROL_OF_ALV.
    CREATE OBJECT alv_controller.
    case sel_node_key.
      WHEN text-001.
        CREATE OBJECT lo_alv
          EXPORTING
            i_parent = right_container.
*        DATA : alv_controller type ref to CONTROL_OF_ALV.
*        CREATE OBJECT alv_controller.
        set HANDLER alv_controller->handle_toolbar FOR lo_alv.
        set HANDLER alv_controller->AFTER_USER_COMMAND for lo_alv.
        set HANDLER alv_controller->USER_COMMAND for lo_alv.


        lo_alv->set_table_for_first_display(
           EXPORTING
                       is_layout       = ls_layout
                       i_save          = 'A'
                       is_variant      = w_variant
           CHANGING
                     it_outtab       = tab_of_vblen_status
                     it_fieldcatalog = fieldcat_of_right

                                           ).

...
ENDMETHOD.

entry.title: Verification of all the general journal entries
entry.content:
Hello SAP community,

We've a requirement that all journal entries posted in SAP must be verified and approved by an approver. However, users occasionally post entries using the 'Post General Journal Entries' option or through mass uploads in the 'Upload Journal Entries' app. This practice creates compliance issues, as reviewers must manually search for journals posted without approval.

We explored whether we could adjust the business roles to address this issue. Unfortunately, the business catalog that provides access to the 'Verify Journal Entries' app also includes access to the 'Manage Journal Entries' app.

Is there a way to ensure that all journal entries are properly approved before they are posted irrespective of the application used?

Thank you.

 

Best regards,

Rishav.

entry.title: Re: Flexible Workflow Steps
entry.content:
Thank you for this super informative blog Ruthvik.

Just want to add:

By default, the flexible workflow for purchase orders is active only for the document type NB (standard purchase order). To activate flexible workflow for any other document type, the settings have to be updated as required.

Thanks again.

entry.title: How to create fiscal year period hierarchy in datasphere
entry.content:
I Need to create Fiscal Year Period Hierarchy . Below is the required structure that we need to display 

Year > Quarter > Period ,Year

entry.title: Re: minSdkVersion 26 cannot be smaller than version 30 de...
entry.content: The app.gradle file is shipped as part of the Asset Manager branding SDK. If you grab the latest version from the SAP Marketplace you can find the default version for SSAM 2310.

entry.title: Re: minSdkVersion 26 cannot be smaller than version 30 de...
entry.content: Hi @bill_froelich, I have downloaded the Asset Manager branding SDK ASSTMGRBRNDSDK00P_500-80008452 from SAP software center, but it does not contain build.gradle file

entry.title: Re: read field with namespace segment xpath cloud integra...
entry.content:
Hello @mark_fryu,

It is indeed related to the namespace. You can add a namespace mapping in the Runtime Configuration tab of your integration flow, for example "xmlns:test=test_message1"

And then refer to this namespace in your xpath, i.e.: "/test:message1/test:message2"

I hope this will help you!
